problem_statement: Scott needs a central queryable repo of GFD knowledge: Teams meeting recordings/transcripts, newsletters, steering committee docs. Must generate reports, presentations, and docs from ingested data. Stretch: email interview agent for Portfolio/Program leaders.

engagement_tracks.name: Agentic Knowledge System
engagement_tracks.description: Ingest -> Store -> Query -> Generate pipeline for GFD data

open_questions: Is this the correct problem space? (Andy validation)
Where does PortOps live — Ceremony servers or Lilly infrastructure?
Would Teams transcript collection be sufficient data foundation?
Purchase authority at Ceremony-resell vs Lilly direct?
